basics.name: Bender Bending Rodriguez
basics.label: Bending Unit, Ship Cook, and Occasional Folk Hero
basics.summary: Charismatic bending unit with extensive experience in industrial fabrication, galactic delivery support, culinary operations, stage performance, and creative problem solving. Known for working under pressure, operating with minimal supervision, and delivering results in environments where the rules are more of a suggestion.

cover_letter.title: Why hire me
items: I'm a versatile bending unit with hands-on experience in manufacturing, cargo handling, food service, entertainment, and high-risk delivery missions. I thrive in chaotic environments, keep morale high, and can bend nearly any material to specification.

My background includes factory-floor bending, interplanetary logistics with Planet Express, and leadership in several unsanctioned side ventures. I bring speed, durability, improvisation, and a healthy disregard for impossible deadlines.

cover_letter.title: Core strengths
items: Precision bending for steel, titanium, and novelty materials
Cargo support and field operations on hazardous delivery routes
Large-scale cooking for crews with low standards and fast turnaround needs
Public performance, persuasion, and brand-building through music and spectacle
Thank you for your consideration. Offer me the job, meatbag.

work.name: Planet Express
work.position: Ship's Bending Unit and Senior Delivery Crew Member
work.summary:
Core crew member supporting interplanetary delivery, field operations, onboard cooking, 
and ad hoc tactical solutions.
highlights: Supported hundreds of off-world delivery missions across hostile, unstable, and bureaucratically impossible environments.
Provided rapid mechanical solutions in the field, including forced entry, structural reshaping, and improvised fabrication.
Maintained crew morale through entertainment, sarcasm, and selective heroism.
Served as primary cook for shipboard meals and emergency buffet situations.

Launched a concurrent folk music career (~3001) after a temporary inability to bend; performed washboard-driven autobiographical sets at bars, robot clubs, and street venues before returning to full bending duties.

work.name: Mom's Friendly Robot Company
work.summary:
Manufactured as a high-capacity bending robot for industrial 
and infrastructure applications.
highlights: Performed repetitive and custom bending operations for girders, pipes, and structural components.
Exceeded factory throughput targets before leaving to pursue a less supervised career path.
Demonstrated exceptional flexibility, torque control, and self-directed initiative from first activation.

work.name: Various Independent Ventures
work.summary:
Launched and operated multiple short-lived but energetic ventures spanning salvage, security, 
entertainment, and premium vice products.
highlights: Created revenue streams in fast-moving markets with minimal startup overhead and maximum improvisation.
Handled negotiations, promotion, inventory movement, and conflict resolution personally.
Learned valuable lessons about regulation, trust, and the importance of plausible deniability.

projects.name: Planet Express Delivery Excellence
projects.description: Ongoing participation in high-risk, high-importance deliveries across space and time.

projects.name: Bending Stage Act
projects.description: Live performance act combining music, bending demonstrations, and crowd work.
